name: Swiss Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------------CHEESECAKE---------------------------------
2 cups Cottage Cheese 1 cup Swiss Cheese; Grated
1/2 cup Granulated Sugar 6 Large Egg Yolks
6 Large Egg Whites Softened Butter; 3 tablespoons, softened
3 tablespoons Unbleached Flour 3 tablespoons Cornstarch
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F. Press the cottage cheese through a sieve. In a large mixing bowl, beat together the cottage cheese, Swiss cheese, butter, flour, cornstarch and sugar, blending well. Add the egg yolks one at a time, beating on low speed after each addition. In another large mixing bowl, beat the egg whites until they form stiff peaks, then fold them gently into the cheese mixture. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust and bake for 45 minutes. The cake will rise above the top of the pan before settling down again. Cool in the oven with the door propped open, then chill.
